title: lithocardium ellipticum
intro: Lithocardium ellipticum, also known as the Lithospermum ellipticum, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating heart conditions and high blood pressure, due to its diuretic and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Lithocardium ellipticum include reducing inflammation, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving cardiovascular function. Lithocardium ellipticum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, to be used as a natural remedy for its medicinal properties.
